what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset named p-06 in the design-source channel under recent-pitches; it stores metadata, provenance, and a blob reference rather than the image itself.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id recent-pitches/p-06 and address image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-06
mime is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-06.jpg'
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite image/jpeg mime
A blob URI is the actual storage pointer
Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
No outgoing links or descriptive caption
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured ledger metadata
Records author session and creation timestamp
Separates machine metadata from a human-readable source label
concerns: w and h are 0, which is suspicious for an image record
No links to related pitches, designs, or concepts
No caption, alt text, or content description of the image
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a pitch image that has a blob pointer and provenance but lacks dimensions, links, and any description of what it shows.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does recent-pitches/p-06.jpg contain?
Which pitch or concept does this image belong to?
Why are there no links to related ledger entries?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as a ledger record for a design-source image matches the content, but the zero dimensions undermine its usefulness as a reliable image asset entry.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a recent pitch image as an authoritative, traceable design-source artifact with a stable address and blob reference.
contribution: Provides a metadata stub that anchors an image asset to a channel path, blob URI, author session, and creation time, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the underlying image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger stub for the image recent-pitches/p-06.jpg in the design-source channel, holding a blob reference, authorship, timestamp, and zero dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to catalog a recent pitch image as ground-truth design source material with traceable provenance.
